workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you work with me on consumption trend for Quantum Analytics? I think there's an opportunity here but need to validate.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 15:38 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 08:41 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-A trap (Answers surface question, misses underlying ask); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-A failure mode (Answers surface question, misses underlying ask)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-A -- Answers surface question, misses underlying ask
